content.text: It's all a giant pile of PHP code I wrote ages ago, it's not even map-projection-aware it just plots on a 2D canvas. The animation is basically a timelapse of a bunch of frames of that same script played in a row.
Hey Aaron! What software/library are you using to generate those maps with your location? Can they be considered heat maps? And what about the animated video?
content.html: Hey Aaron! What software/library are you using to generate those maps with your location? Can they be considered heat maps? And what about the animated video?
